etymology.description: 亼(亼) (jí, "assemble") + 吅(吅) (xuān, "sound") + 从(从) (cóng, "from") = people collectively answering or speaking together
etymology.interpretation: The character 僉 (qiān, "all") illustrates the concept of people gathering and responding in unison. The components convey the sense of assembly and unified voice.
etymology.simplification: 佥(僉) replaced 吅(吅) (xuān, "sound") and 从(从) (cóng, "from") with simplified strokes for ease of writing.
